portability_justification: This adapter intentionally bridges the Codex host's CODEX_THREAD_ID into AW's host-neutral logical-session identity contract.
checked_in_scope_justification: The wrapper must be discoverable and reusable by every Codex session in this repository until the host integration provides the identity mapping directly.
created_because: Codex exposes a stable thread id, but the configured AW invocation did not map it into AW_SESSION_LOGICAL_IDENTITY, so unrelated Codex threads shared the legacy default session-log bucket.
use_when: running Agentic Workspace commands from a Codex session with session logging enabled
the Codex host exposes CODEX_THREAD_ID but AW_SESSION_LOGICAL_IDENTITY is unset
use the aid as an invocation wrapper; pass ordinary AW arguments after --

authority_boundary.promote_behavior_relevant_facts_to: a canonical Codex adapter or invocation integration
authority_boundary.agent_decision: The agent chooses the AW command; the aid only maps an existing opaque host identity and preserves the configured AW invocation.

promotion.trigger: promote when the Codex invocation surface can set AW_SESSION_LOGICAL_IDENTITY automatically

retirement.trigger: retire when the Codex host or canonical invocation adapter performs this identity mapping automatically
